_note: Conventions in axum/src: traits (FromRequest, FromRequestParts, IntoResponse, Handler) define the extractor/response/handler abstractions; tower::Service is the integration layer; all_the_tuples macro generates blanket impls for varying tuple sizes; include_str! loads markdown doc strings from docs/ directory; PathRouter wraps matchit for URL dispatch; BoxedIntoRoute type-erases handlers; from_fn creates middleware from async functions; tap_inner/map_inner macros handle Arc-wrapped RouterInner mutation; Endpoint enum distinguishes MethodRouter vs Route.
